plan_metadata.name: Feature intelli sense editing yaml use DA None

steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent - Agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot" option in the "New Project" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Add an Action" option in the dropdown menu of the "Create Declarative Agent" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Start with a New API" option in the "Create an Action" dropdown menu in Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
Click the "None" option in the "Select an authentication type" dropdown within the "Authentication Type" dialog of Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Select the "Default folder" option (path: /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects) in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "m365agents.yml" file in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to select it.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
file="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_WyQRj/m365agents.yml"
temp_file="${file}.tmp"

if [ ! -f "$file" ]; then
  echo "File not found: $file" >&2
  exit 1
fi

awk 'NR!=17 && NR!=18' "$file" > "$temp_file"
mv "$temp_file" "$file"
echo "Removed lines 17 and 18 from $file"
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
Removed lines 17 and 18 from /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_WyQRj/m365agents.yml

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description: Click at the end of the comment line "# Write the information of created resources into environment file(s)" in the "m365agents.yml" file editor within Visual Studio Code.
Press the Enter key in the integrated terminal of Visual Studio Code, within the workspace "vscuse_app_WyQRJ".
Type text: 'wr' into line 17 of the "m365agents.yml" file in Visual Studio Code, within the "VSCSUSE_APP_WYQRJ" workspace, inside the main code editor pane.
Press the Enter key while the "m365agents.yml" file is open in VS Code, with the cursor positioned after the auto-completed "writeToEnvironmentFile" suggestion in the YAML editor.
